mapper.select:
SELECT MIN(g.name) AS name, MIN(g.number) AS goodsNo, MIN(g.spec) AS spec, MIN(g.unit) AS unit, s.warehouse AS warehouseNumber, -- 传子查询 MIN(w.name) AS warehouseName, -- 展示 s.goods AS gid, -- 传子查询 #{q.startTime} AS startTime, #{q.endTime} AS endTime FROM summary s JOIN goods g ON g.id = s.goods JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = s.warehouse
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.goods}, '%')
AND s.time >= #{q.startTime}
AND s.time < DATE_ADD(#{q.endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND s.warehouse IN
#{wid}
GROUP BY s.goods, s.warehouse ORDER BY MIN(g.name) ASC, MIN(w.name) ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(s.nums)=0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(SUM(s.bct)/SUM(s.nums),4) END AS price, SUM(s.nums) AS nums, SUM(s.bct) AS total FROM summary s
s.goods = #{goodsId} AND s.warehouse = #{warehouseId} AND s.type = 'swap' AND s.direction = 1 AND s.time >= #{startTime} AND s.time < DATE_ADD(#{endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(s.nums)=0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(SUM(s.bct)/SUM(s.nums),4) END AS price, SUM(s.nums) AS nums, SUM(s.bct) AS total FROM summary s
s.goods = #{goodsId} AND s.warehouse = #{warehouseId} AND s.type = 'swap' AND s.direction = 0 AND s.time >= #{startTime} AND s.time < DATE_ADD(#{endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(ri.nums)=0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(SUM(ri.price*ri.nums)/SUM(ri.nums),4) END AS price, SUM(ri.nums) AS nums, SUM(ri.price*ri.nums) AS total FROM room r JOIN room_info ri ON ri.pid = r.id
r.goods = #{goodsId} AND r.warehouse = #{warehouseId}

SELECT MIN(g.name) AS name, MIN(g.number) AS goodsNo, MIN(g.spec) AS spec, MIN(g.unit) AS unit, s.warehouse AS warehouseNumber, MIN(w.name) AS warehouseName, s.goods AS gid, #{q.startTime} AS startTime, #{q.endTime} AS endTime FROM summary s JOIN goods g ON g.id = s.goods JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = s.warehouse
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.goods}, '%')
AND s.time >= #{q.startTime}
AND s.time < DATE_ADD(#{q.endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND s.warehouse IN
#{wid}
GROUP BY s.goods, s.warehouse ORDER BY MIN(g.name) ASC, MIN(w.name) ASC
